definitions.es: Una obligación de pagar dinero a alguien.
definitions.en: An obligation to pay money to someone.
definitions.vi: Một nghĩa vụ phải trả tiền cho ai đó.

example.vi: Tôi có một khoản nợ lớn.

notes:
nợ = debt; money you owe someone. It also works as a verb: to owe (money, a favor, an apology).

As a noun, it’s often paired with words like món nợ, khoản nợ, nợ nần (general state of being in debt).  
As a verb, it follows this pattern:  

It’s not just about money — you can nợ ân tình (owe someone emotionally).  
Opposite idea: trả (nợ) = to pay back.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He still has a large debt to the bank.
She does not want any debt to anyone in life.
I must pay off all debt before buying a new car.

translation.en: I have a debt with the bank.

exampleSentences: Anh vẫn còn nợ ngân hàng một số tiền lớn.
Chị không muốn nợ ai bất cứ điều gì trong cuộc sống.
Em phải trả hết nợ trước khi mua xe mới.

translation.en: I have a debt with the bank.

notes_md:
**nợ** = debt; money you owe someone. It also works as a **verb**: to owe (money, a favor, an apology).

As a noun, it’s often paired with words like **món nợ, khoản nợ, nợ nần** (general state of being in debt).  
As a verb, it follows this pattern:  

It’s not just about money — you can **nợ ân tình** (owe someone emotionally).  
Opposite idea: **trả (nợ)** = to pay back.
